basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate with GATE Score card
qualification.details: M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech in Geospatial Engineering / Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering or related disciplines with CGPA above 6.5 (on 10.0 scale) or percentage greater than 65% aggregate with GATE Score card.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Roorkee to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./ M.Tech./ M.S. and B.E./B.Tech degree in specific disciplines like Geospatial Engineering, Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & GIS, Computer Science, Data Science, or Electrical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 65% aggregate, along with a valid GATE Score card.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will involve an Online Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post announced by the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Roorkee offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific details on age relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Roorkee is a contractual role. The appointment will be on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can click on the respective links to access them.
